title: festuca poiformis
intro: Festuca poiformis, also known as mountain fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Festuca poiformis include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Festuca poiformis typically involve infusing the plant in hot water to make a tea or using it in tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
